verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Take me back, take me back dear Lord To the place where I first received you. Take me back, take me back dear Lord where I first believe.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I feel that I'm so far from you Lord But still I hear you calling me Those simple things that I once knew, The memories are drawing me. I must confess, Lord I've been blessed But yet my soul's not satisfied. Renew my faith, restore my joy And dry my weeping eyes.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I tried so hard To make it all alone I need your help Just to make it home.
